title: Move product admin to an independent strangler app
context: The built-in Medusa dashboard fallback and backend src/admin extension have been retired after the independent Next admin reached parity for product, order, customer, support, growth, AI, operations, and system settings surfaces. Medusa remains the headless /admin/* API engine behind the same-origin admin BFF.
decision: apps/admin is the product admin surface. Browser code calls only same-origin Next BFF routes; the BFF stores the admin JWT in an httpOnly cookie and forwards Medusa /admin/* requests with Bearer auth. Default CI typechecking covers backend API code, storefront, and apps/admin; the legacy Medusa dashboard extension typecheck and dashboard patch are removed.
consequences: New admin work must land in apps/admin and use the BFF for /admin/* calls.
Browser code must not call Medusa directly or receive the admin JWT.
The backend package must not reintroduce src/admin extensions, @medusajs/ui dashboard pages, or pnpm dashboard patches.
